Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2025

1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy describes how lopezkristian.com handles information when you visit it. I take your privacy seriously and aim to be transparent about what data, if any, is collected.

2. What Data Is Collected

This site does not collect personal data by default. There are no tracking cookies, no third-party analytics scripts, and no user accounts.

If analytics are enabled via the PUBLIC_ANALYTICS_ID environment variable, a privacy-first analytics tool (Plausible or Umami) may collect aggregate, anonymized page view data. These tools do not use cookies and do not collect personal information.

3. Contact Form

If you submit the contact form, the data you provide (name, email, message) is sent to the configured serverless form handler. It is used solely to respond to your inquiry and is not shared with third parties.

4. Third-Party Links

This site links to external services (GitHub, LinkedIn). Those services have their own privacy policies. I am not responsible for their practices.

5. Your Rights (GDPR)

If you are in the EU, you have the right to:

  • Access any data I hold about you
  • Request correction or deletion of your data
  • Object to processing
  • Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority

To exercise any of these rights, contact me via the contact form.

6. Changes to This Policy

This policy may be updated occasionally. Significant changes will be noted at the top of this page with the updated date.

© 2026 Kristian López. All rights reserved.

Built with Astro + TypeScript + Tailwind
